data.description:
~3,200 LOC of live-Jira probe shell shipped in the wheel. Evidence: zero inbound references — not in docs/releasing.md (documented release probe is scripts/probe-rebar.sh), not CI, no tests. Contain dso_label vars (e2e_field_validation_probe.sh:1319-1348) and 'DSO ... probe' Jira summaries. RECOMMEND delete (they are unowned); alternative: adopt as operator tooling — move under scripts/ or tests/, sweep DSO strings, wire into docs/releasing.md. Either way they must leave the published package (pyproject ships all of _engine/**).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Decision recorded (delete vs adopt) in the ticket
- [ ] Files removed from src/rebar/_engine/ (deleted, or relocated + de-dso'd + documented)
- [ ] Wheel no longer ships them; full suite green
data.title: Decide + remove or adopt: e2e_validation_probe.sh / e2e_field_validation_probe.sh (live-Jira probes)
